response.justification: Bogdan is a capable polyglot engineer with roughly 20 years of hands-on development experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks. However, the role demands a director-level individual contributor who can shape cloud and AI strategy at an enterprise scale, advise strategic customers, and demonstrate recognized thought leadership in AI. Bogdan's background is firmly that of a senior/staff-level practitioner — his current AI work is nascent and tooling-scoped rather than platform-strategic, he holds no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and there is no evidence of executive-level advisory, public AI thought leadership, or cloud architecture at the scale this position requires.
strengths: Long and diverse engineering career (~20 years) spanning embedded, web, mobile, and infrastructure — demonstrates genuine technical breadth.
Recent hands-on work in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq signals genuine engagement with the current AI tooling space.
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective and community contributions (workshops, talks, open-source libraries) shows initiative beyond a pure individual-contributor mindset.
concerns: No director-level or strategic leadership experience — all roles are senior/staff practitioner positions with no evidence of cross-org influence, executive customer advisory, or roadmap ownership at scale.

AI expertise is recent, narrow, and tooling-focused (MCP generators, agentic workflows) rather than demonstrated product or platform leadership in AI that would satisfy the 'recognized expertise' bar.
No advanced degree in AI or a related field, and no cloud architecture credentials or enterprise cloud strategy experience to anchor the cloud-platform pillar of the role.
